name: json-stringified-context
description: doc-summarizer is passing JSON.stringify'd document objects as prompt input instead of plain text. 100% of doc-summarizer traces affected. Input tokens are 3x normal because of JSON structure/escaping overhead.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.
- **doc-summarizer**: Summarizes uploaded documents. 2-3 LLM calls, varies by doc length. Normal latency: 5-15s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$8
- Trace volume: ~300/day
- customer-support-bot: ~150/day
- email-classifier: ~100/day
- doc-summarizer: ~50/day

input.note: today's avg is 3.2x the historical average

input.input_preview_pattern: All inputs begin with '{"document":{"id":"...', contain escaped newlines (\n), JSON keys like "metadata", "created_at", "raw_content" — full serialized document objects rather than plain text
